news.t: Space ETFs: How SpaceX Is Reshaping the Theme
Pure Play or Hybrid? Unpacking the Rise of Space ETFs
Cathie Wood said Ark Invest would buy stock in Lucid and Rivian if the companies enter the autonomous vehicle space
Did Cathie Wood beat the benchmark in the third quarter?

holdings.infoBox: ARKX is an equity ETF with a total of 36 individual holdings. The top holdings are Space Exploration Technologies stock at 9.72%, L3Harris Technologies at 6.72%, Rocket Lab at 6.41%, Kratos Defense & Security Solutions at 5.94%, and Deere & Company at 5.42%.

overview.description: The ARK Space & Defense Innovation ETF (ARKX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in industrials equity. The fund actively selects global companies engaged in space exploration and innovation. The fund seeks long-term capital growth. ARKX was launched on Mar 30, 2021 and is issued by ARK.

data.title: Space ETFs: How SpaceX Is Reshaping the Theme
data.text: Key Takeaways: SpaceX's IPO has created strong ETF demand across leveraged, active, and index-based strategies. The Procure Space ETF (UFO) remains central as the original pure-play space ETF, with it...

data.title: Pure Play or Hybrid? Unpacking the Rise of Space ETFs
data.text: The rise of dedicated space ETFs is a relatively recent development. For years, investors seeking exposure to the space economy were largely limited to broad aerospace and defense funds.

data.title: Cathie Wood said Ark Invest would buy stock in Lucid and Rivian if the companies enter the autonomous vehicle space
data.text: "If we saw Lucid and Rivian getting into the autonomous world, especially Rivian ... that might be more interesting," Cathie Wood told CNBC.

data.title: Did Cathie Wood beat the benchmark in the third quarter?
data.text: Macro headwinds sure made it challenging for investors to make good money out of the benchmark S&P 500 index in the third quarter. But did ones with money in Cathie Wood's Ark ETFs had it any better?
